file_summary: This is a GitHub issue template for reporting bugs in the ItsDangerous project. It provides a structured format with sections for bug description, reproduction steps, expected behavior, and environment details. The template includes instructional comments to guide users on proper usage and what information to include.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire bug report template. Lines 1-3 define the template's name and purpose. Lines 5-9 provide instructions about using the issue tracker only for ItsDangerous bugs. Lines 11-13 mark where users should describe the bug. Lines 15-20 mark where users should provide reproduction steps. Lines 22-24 mark where users should describe expected behavior. Lines 26-27 provide fields for environment details (Python and ItsDangerous versions).
